{{Infobox artifact
| name = Emperor's crown (The Elder Empire: Sea)
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Emperor's crown (The Elder Empire: Sea) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Emperor]]'s crown is a golden circlet that served as a primary symbol of authority for the founder of the [[Elder Empire]]. While historical depictions show him wearing bronze, he eventually transitioned to gold to signify a new era for his civilization. [[The crown]] was not an everyday item; [[the Emperor]] reserved its use for public appearances and addressing large crowds to project his status as a unified icon of humanity. It possesses significant power, acting as an invested object that can influence others. When worn, the crown allows the user's commands to carry more weight, functioning as suggestions to most, but becoming absolute orders to those who view themselves as loyal subjects. [[The crown]] was considered [[the Emperor]]'s most prized possession, which he kept for his entire nearly two-millennium lifespan. In contrast to this original gold piece, a silver circlet known as the [[Steward]]'s crown was used by his body double.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Emperor]]'s crown is a golden artifact utilized by [[Calder Marten]]. This invested object possesses greater power than standard items due to the bound [[Intent]] contained within it. When the crown is [[Awakened]], it grants the wearer the ability to control individuals against their will and can be used to persuade the [[Consultants]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Emperor]]'s crown contains bound [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The crown]] is an invested object more powerful than normal ones.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The crown]] requires being [[Awakened]] to control people against their will.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The crown]] can be used to persuade the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Emperor]]'s crown is an artifact used by [[Calder Marten]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] wears [[the Emperor]]'s crown.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Emperor]]'s crown is a golden crown.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Emperor]]’s crown can infuse words with [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Emperor]]'s crown is a lost [[Imperial]] relic and a gold circlet resting on velvet lining that was crafted by the [[Magister]]’s [[Guild]] with help from [[Regent]] [[Loreli]]. This object, which contains [[the Emperor]]'s memories, is a prize sought by [[Great Elders]] and potentially the Collector of Souls. Held within a heavy safe carried by a toad creature, the crown possesses the power to defend [[Calder]] and soothe allies. Its return would benefit the Empire, though touching the relic overwhelms a user with the immense force of [[the Emperor]]'s will.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Emperor]]'s crown is an [[Imperial]] relic that has been lost.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Emperor]]'s crown is the object to be retrieved.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Emperor]]’s crown contains [[the Emperor]]'s memories.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Emperor]]’s crown is an item that the Collector of Souls might seek.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c8">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Emperor]]'s crown has power to defend [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Emperor]]'s crown is a prize that [[Great Elders]] might seek.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A crown is kept in a heavy safe carried by the cook.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c12">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The return of the crown would benefit the Empire.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Emperor]]’s crown was in a safe held by a toad creature.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Emperor]]'s crown is a gold circlet resting on a velvet lining.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Emperor]]'s crown was made by the [[Magister]]’s [[Guild]] with assistance from [[Regent]] [[Loreli]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Touching [[the Emperor]]'s crown overwhelms the user with the force of [[the Emperor]]'s will.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Emperor]]’s crown can be used to soothe allies.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
